summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Persistent Inventory feature. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all CRUD operations, categorized display, inline quantity buttons, PC switching, and data persistence after page refresh.
passed_tests: GET /api/inventory returns items for specific PC
GET /api/inventory returns empty list for non-existent PC
POST /api/inventory creates new item in MongoDB
POST /api/inventory with different location values (getragen, ausgerüstet, gelagert)
PUT /api/inventory/{id} updates item in MongoDB
PUT /api/inventory/{id} with only quantity (inline +/- buttons)
PUT /api/inventory/{id} returns 404 for non-existent item
DELETE /api/inventory/{id} removes item from MongoDB
GET /api/sandbox/inventar/{pc_id} returns categorized inventory
GET /api/sandbox/inventar/{pc_id} returns 404 for non-existent PC
Inventar shows location grouping (Ausgerüstet, Mitgeführt, Gelagert)
Different PCs have separate inventory items
Item persists after creation (simulated page refresh)
Quantity change persists after update
UI: Inventar tab is default first tab on /finances
UI: Add item dialog opens with + Gegenstand button
UI: Edit item via pencil icon opens prefilled dialog
UI: Delete item via trash icon removes from list
UI: Inline quantity +/- buttons update immediately
UI: Items persist after page refresh
UI: PC dropdown switches and reloads correct inventory
UI: Summary card shows item count and category count
seed_data_creation: Used existing test PCs: Heinrich der Schmied (158e58e5-a7c8-40cf-acd3-3b31b0a2b2e4) with 4 items, Dr. Elara Voss (182869c5-04a8-4395-a8de-ecde1aa53128) with 4 items
context_for_next_testing_agent: Persistent Inventory feature fully implemented and tested. Campaign ID: 2b18dad2-4484-4ab6-bb65-0667f35fff19. Inventar tab is the DEFAULT first tab on /finances page. All inventory CRUD APIs working: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/inventory, GET /api/sandbox/inventar/{pc_id}. Frontend shows categorized items by location (Ausgerüstet, Mitgeführt, Gelagert) with inline quantity +/- buttons, edit/delete icons, and add item dialog.

components_verified: Categorized items grouped by location (Ausgerüstet, Mitgeführt, Gelagert)
Add item button (+ Gegenstand) opens dialog
Edit item via pencil icon opens prefilled dialog
Delete item via trash icon with confirmation
Summary card shows item count and category count
PC selector dropdown reloads inventory for selected PC

backend_apis.GET /api/inventory: Returns items filtered by campaign_id and owner_pc_id
backend_apis.POST /api/inventory: Creates item with id, timestamps, all fields
backend_apis.PUT /api/inventory/{id}: Updates item fields, returns 404 for non-existent
backend_apis.GET /api/sandbox/inventar/{pc_id}: Returns categorized view with finances and properties
